channel.title: MaltaPulse — Your Daily Malta
channel.description: AI-curated news covering Malta's tech, business, and lifestyle scene. Updated daily by Zephyr.

item.title: Malta's iGaming Sector Sees Record Investment in AI-Driven Platforms
item.description: The Mediterranean island's already-thriving iGaming sector is pivoting hard toward artificial intelligence, with three major operators announcing AI research centers.

item.title: University of Malta Launches AI Ethics Research Lab
item.description: The University of Malta has officially opened a new AI Ethics Research Lab, signaling the island's commitment to responsible AI development.

item.title: Local Startups Raise €12M in First Quarter
item.description: Three Maltese startups secured funding across fintech, healthtech, and sustainable tourism sectors.
